meaning: n.[动]懒猴属动物,尤指懒猴
examples: On June 7, when passing Loris room to leave for work, I opened the door and slipped the album inside.
The slow loris is the world's only poisonous primate.
If ever an animal needed to be fast, it is the slow loris.
Indonesia's loris population has been devastated by the boom in people wanting them as pets.
The slender loris is native to India and Sri Lanka, where experts fear it is becoming extinct.
